nomenclaturalStatus: nom. inval.    Contrary to Art. 6.10. ICN (2025). Basionym not validly published.
originalName: Lycopodiaceae Urostachys warneckei Herter ex Nessel

namePublishedin: Trans. Linn. Soc. London, Bot. 1: 459. 1880 (as 'var. intermedia')

nomenclaturalStatus: nom. illeg. nom. superfl.    The article author C.B. Clarke (p. 425) mentioned; 'After the different tribes have been written out, Major Henderson has gone over the whole material at Kew with me; he has corrected several slips that I had made; and in the body of the paper I have in all cases mentioned particularly any point wherein he differs from what I have written. The present paper is therefore virtually a paper by Major Henderson and myself; but, as I have done all the writing, he declined to have it so entitled, and on p. 459, Clarke published 'Onychium japonicum var. multisecta (sp.) F. Henderson, Ms.', cited Leptostegia lucida D.Don as a synonym, and remarked '[After going through the Kew material with me, F. Henderson would still prefer to make O. multisectum a species]'
